raw.subject: Your Nashville page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

When's the last time you've truly felt like you could check out? I thought that 'works package' post about Ole Glory Barbershop really stood out to me.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on bookings and calls from customers looking to experience what you're offering.

I sketched up a little idea from what you share on Facebook - a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions so customers can easily find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/ole-glory-barbershop-nashville

It's a straightforward project to build out, and I'd be happy to discuss the details with you.

Let's chat about getting your website up and running so you can keep focusing on what you do best - making customers feel like they can fully check out.
